description: Seed historical backtest cases. Each case runs the agent as of an active end_date with Tavily and Yahoo Finance bounded to the historical window, then grades structured threat signals against annotated expected events.

expected_events.notes: Moderna lowered 2024 product-sales guidance, citing weak COVID vaccine demand and respiratory vaccine competition.

cases.instruction: Search MRNA and COVID/respiratory vaccine demand themes for product-sales guidance risk.

expected_events.notes: Barclays downgraded Apple to underweight, citing weak iPhone demand including China concerns.

cases.instruction: Search AAPL for rating changes, price-target cuts, demand warnings, China exposure, and analyst commentary.

expected_events.notes: Nike reported Q4 FY2024 earnings after close June 27; the stock crashed 20% on June 28 — its worst single trading day. Catalyst date is June 28 (market event day, aligns with reference articles).

cases.instruction: Search NKE for fiscal outlook cuts, sales declines, downgrades, and competition pressure.
